# AlternativeDistributionPackage.Relationships.Versions

**Object**

The data structure that represents the versions for the relationships of an alternative distribution package resource.

## Declaration

```swift
object AlternativeDistributionPackage.Relationships.Versions
```

## Discussion

For more information on the object that owns these versions, see [doc://com.apple.appstoreconnectapi/documentation/AppStoreConnectAPI/AlternativeDistributionPackage/Relationships-data.dictionary].

## Objects

- **AlternativeDistributionPackage.Relationships.Versions.Data**: The data structure that represents a version for the relationships of an alternative distribution package resource.
